arms_mandatory_baselines: alone-R1 per store arm (each arm's own surfaces - the within-arm baseline that makes lifts comparable across arms)
alone-R3 per store arm (bridge restatement of the f2b-form effect; absolute, no ratio, no gate)
shuffled-verify-retry on the kernel store (seed-pinned derangement - the bridge to f2b-replicate, verbatim mechanism; claim-polarity asymmetry disclosed in the design doc section 5 attack 6)

NOTE kernel-as-text + gloss-self-verify text nulls are NOT re-run: the Law-2 nulls were measured against this exact mechanism in f2b-replicate (beats_text_null, beats_gloss_self_verify both passed, audit CONFIRMED) and no claim here exceeds that scope; this record varies STORE CONTENT within the already-nulled mechanism

dependent_vars.definition: per-item correctness on the arm's own rank-prefix item set (n=1000 skeletons, paired across arms by skeleton_uid: identical concept, template type, distractor/donor coordinates and option-slot layout; only store-injected bytes differ - map D-2)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct

dependent_vars.definition: acc(verify-retry-R1, k=4) - acc(alone-R1), item-paired WITHIN arm, seed-averaged; ABSOLUTE - no denominator appears in any verdict-bearing quantity (the F2 degenerate-denominator lesson); the only ratio anywhere is the bridge SECONDARY's recovery fraction, gated behind the bridge instrument gate that bounds its denominator away from zero
dependent_vars.name: lift_abs

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, latency, usd/query, store bytes per arm (F0 ledger; verifier CPU metered at the pinned rate) - DESCRIPTIVE, feeds the flops-parity instrument gate and the V ledger; no efficiency claim is tested in this record
dependent_vars.name: v_components

assumptions.claim: f2b lift +0.1507 absolute (one-sided 95% BCa LB +0.1053) vs 1.7B-alone on fresh covered items, audit CONFIRMED; derangement recovery ~0; adopted licence = correct-alignment-specific (registry/verdicts/f2b-replicate.json + assessments + feasibility-synthesis 2b)

map M-V: 3456/3456 verifier decisions bitwise identical after stripping all non-gloss record fields (poc/knull mock map-check.json, re-proven on the authored-store build 2026-07-10) - kernel vectors/ASTs inject zero bytes into the accept seam; the requested vector-free arm is map-resolved and not run

G-3 token parity at the pinned SmolLM2-135M tokenizer: mean prompt tokens kernel 110.5, plain 104.8 (0.948), opaque 110.9 (1.004), all inside the +/-10% pre-freeze band (run-time gate +/-20%); artifact poc/knull/inputs/g3-token-band.json
power planning bound 0.65-0.95 at margin 0.05, n=1000 - planning constant, never a measurement; resolution: realized CI width at analysis (ASM to be registered at freeze)

the authored plain store (dictionary-register English, zero NSM-legal syntax, linter-gated, LLM-drafted by the Fable designer role - a different vendor/family from the SmolLM2 hosts, disclosed in poc/knull/inputs/plain-authored.json) does not shift verify acceptance dynamics beyond what the within-arm baseline + difficulty gate absorb; resolution: truthstyle-2x2 style axis + the per-type descriptive table (ASM to be registered at freeze)
holding the oracle-favourable construction fixed across arms isolates the content variable; gold-label independence is explicitly out of scope - f2b-transfer owns it (ASM to be registered at freeze)

mock-only artifact: the StubLM chars/4 token proxy undercounts nonce text ~2x, so the SAP flops_parity gate reads false on MOCK records; carries no information about the real gate - pre-freeze evidence is the pinned-tokenizer G-3 artifact; resolution: run-time HFLM-metered FLOPs ledger (ASM to be registered at freeze)

n_planned.best_comparator_rule: pre-declared: the aligned non-NSM arm (plain or opaque) passing the difficulty gate with the larger point lift; selection bias ~+0.01-0.03 on the comparator is inside the margin and conservative AGAINST the content claim (design doc section 5 attack 5)
n_planned.coverage_restatement: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 - MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice
n_planned.holm_family: ONE family F-sec(knull), membership pre-declared: shuffled_low_recovery, f2b_form_positive; bootstrap-inversion p-values on the shared resampling plan; per-type breakdown is DESCRIPTIVE and outside the family
n_planned.item_source: poc/knull/inputs/items/{kernel,plain,opaque}.jsonl - 1080 skeletons over the 108 covered concepts, generator seed knull/1|knull-content-injection-ablation|20260710, LC8 prompt-surface-disjoint from all 650 d-qa + 1000 d-qa-r logged surfaces IN EVERY ARM (fail-closed), rank-prefix 1000 consumed; type mix identical across arms: 324 def-match / 324 term-match / 56 claim-true / 376 claim-false (fork F-KN-D discloses the claim-true scarcity)
n_planned.pairing: skeleton_uid - identical concept, template type, distractor/donor concept coordinates and option-slot layout across arms; only store-injected bytes differ (content-injection map D-2)
n_planned.power: power 0.65-0.95 at margin 0.05, n=1000 paired skeletons, from f2b-measured variance scaled + the mock half-width under arm-independent stub noise - STIPULATED planning bound, never a measurement; resolution: realized CI width at analysis; fork F-KN-C margin call FINALIZED at 0.05 (n=1000 >= 900; poc/knull/inputs/g3-token-band.json)
n_planned.prefreeze_gates_evidence: G-1 authored plain store poc/knull/inputs/plain-authored.json linter green; G-2 plain_store_placeholder=false, manifest re-pinned, --dry-plan green; G-3 pinned-tokenizer token-band re-check PASS (kernel 110.5 / plain 104.8 / opaque 110.9 mean prompt tokens; opaque word target token-calibrated x0.48 after the uncalibrated band measured 2.09x); G-4 this analysis_script pin; G-5 checklists in prereg_doc section 6.5

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (exactly one): TOST equivalence at margin +/-0.05 ABSOLUTE on D = mean_i [ lift_i(kernel) - lift_i(best) ], lift_i(a) = seedmean(verify_i) - seedmean(alone_i) within arm a, i indexes paired skeletons; best = the aligned non-NSM arm passing the difficulty gate with the larger point lift (pre-declared selection); paired skeleton-level BCa bootstrap B=10000, seed 20260710, ONE shared resampling plan across all statistics; equivalent iff one-sided 95% BCa LB > -0.05 AND one-sided 95% BCa UB < +0.05. Superiority read: LB > +0.05 (/analysis/kernel_superior_beyond_margin). Inferiority read: UB < -0.05 (/analysis/kernel_inferior_beyond_margin). ABSOLUTE lifts only - no ratio is verdict-bearing anywhere in the primary

INSTRUMENT gate (H-KN3 part 1): kernel-arm lift one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 - the ablation cannot attribute a lift that failed to reproduce; on failure the verdict is INSTRUMENT-INVALID (nothing to attribute), never a hypothesis event; a bridge failure raises a surface-sensitivity flag on the F2 line and does NOT contradict the f2b-replicate PASS (different surfaces)

INSTRUMENT gate per aligned arm: |acc(alone-R1, arm) - acc(alone-R1, kernel)| <= 0.15 (3-seed mean; /gates/difficulty_band_plain, /gates/difficulty_band_opaque); a failing arm leaves the comparator set BEFORE selection; both failing => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (fork F-KN-B is decided BY this gate at analysis time, not by a person)
INSTRUMENT gate per arm: extraction-success Wilson-LB >= 0.90 over all verify calls (P10 discipline, measured in-run; per-arm fields /gates/extraction_wilson_lb_*)

INSTRUMENT gate: per-query mean FLOPs of each aligned verify arm within +/-20% of the kernel verify arm (F0 ledger; fields /gates/flops_ratio_*) - the matched-budget guarantee, enforced at build by the token-calibrated word band and pre-verified at the pinned tokenizer (G-3 artifact, ratios 0.948/1.004); NOTE the gate reads FALSE on MOCK records only (StubLM chars/4 proxy undercounts nonce text - disclosed stipulated mock artifact)

Holm family F-sec(knull) (H-KN3 part 2): shuffled-derangement recovery on the kernel store < 0.30 (one-sided 95% BCa UB), the f2b-replicate secondary verbatim, on the regenerated surfaces; the recovery ratio's denominator is bounded away from zero by the bridge gate; interpreted with the disclosed claim-polarity asymmetry (design doc section 5 attack 6; fork F-KN-D's kill applies if failure is claim-type-only)
Holm family F-sec(knull): kernel-arm acc(verify-retry R1) - acc(alone R3) one-sided 95% BCa LB > 0 - the f2b-replicate primary's form restated on regenerated surfaces (absolute, no denominator)

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY, never verdict-bearing, OUTSIDE the Holm family (registered as secondary because kot-reg/1 has no descriptive role): per item-type accuracies and lifts per arm; headroom-normalized lifts are reported here and NOWHERE else

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: claims are scoped to <=1.7B hosts (verify host 135M; 1.7B only as the bridge baseline), the kernel-covered SELF-AUTHORED templated definitional-QA family over the same 108 covered concepts, k=4, this normalization/accept machinery (norm_text string identity + segment membership), and the oracle-favourable construction HELD FIXED BY DESIGN in every arm - verbatim: on the D-QA slice the verifier's accept test is string-equality to the same canonical record that DEFINED the gold answer, so its measured lift is inflated by the eval's construction; K-NULL varies only WHAT the store says, never that construction, so NO outcome here speaks to gold-label independence (f2b-transfer's question), to externally-authored items, to non-templated phrasings, to hosts >1.7B, or to any other corpus. Equivalence (NULL) licenses the relabel of the f2b lift as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect AT THIS SCOPE and nothing wider; superiority (PASS) licenses NSM-content contribution >= 0.05 absolute AT THIS SCOPE and says nothing about semantics-in-general or transfer. Coverage disclosure (mandatory, verbatim): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 - MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage; every accuracy claim is bounded to the kernel-covered slice. Two host rungs license a SIGN, not a slope.
hypotheses: H-KN1 equivalence (the deflationary reading): |lift(kernel) - lift(best aligned non-NSM store)| < 0.05 (TOST, one-sided 95% BCa bounds both inside the margin) => the verify-retry lift is store-content-generic - recorded as verdict NULL with the same prominence as a PASS (design doc maps this to PASS-GENERIC)

H-KN2 superiority (the content reading): lift(kernel) - lift(best) > 0.05 one-sided (BCa LB > +0.05) => NSM content carries weight beyond alignment at this scope - verdict PASS (design doc: PASS-CONTENT); the inverse (kernel INFERIOR beyond margin, BCa UB < -0.05) is a registered outcome - verdict FAIL (deflationary a fortiori: NSM surface is a net cost at matched alignment)

H-KN3 bridge: the kernel arm reproduces the f2b mechanism signature on regenerated surfaces - verify-retry lift over R1-alone one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05 (instrument gate, failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never a hypothesis event) and shuffled-derangement recovery < 0.30 (Holm secondary, the f2b bound verbatim)
kill_criterion_verbatim: K-NULL verbatim kills (verdict-enum mapping: NULL carries PASS-GENERIC, PASS carries PASS-CONTENT, FAIL carries KERNEL-INFERIOR; equal prominence for all outcomes): (a) bridge gate fails (kernel-arm lift LB <= +0.05 on regenerated surfaces) => INSTRUMENT-INVALID - the f2b mechanism did not reproduce, nothing to attribute, and the f2b-replicate PASS is NOT thereby contradicted (different surfaces) but a surface-sensitivity flag is raised on the F2 line; (b) TOST passes (verdict NULL) => the kernel-content attribution DIES at this scope - the f2b lift is licensed as a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect, all forward narration adopts that phrase, and F2-line investment re-routes to authoring-cost economics (the narrowed efficiency reading) and to f2b-transfer; (c) kernel-INFERIOR beyond margin (UB < -0.05, verdict FAIL) => same deflationary consequence as (b) PLUS NSM surface is a measured net cost at matched alignment - the strongest anti-content outcome; (d) BOTH aligned arms fail the difficulty band => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, redesign the stores (forks F-KN-B/F-KN-C), mint a new id; nulls and positives get equal prominence.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

title: knull - K-NULL store-content ablation of the f2b verify-retry mechanism: kernel-NSM vs aligned authored plain-dictionary vs opaque-nonce stores at identical alignment, retry topology and matched token budgets; content-injection map first (docs/design-knull-content-injection-ablation.md section 1); decides whether the f2b +0.1507 is a generic aligned-deterministic-answer-key + retry effect or carries NSM-content weight, WITHIN the oracle-favourable construction held fixed by design (gold-label independence stays with f2b-transfer); the requested vector-free arm is MAP-RESOLVED at zero cost (3456/3456 bitwise-identical verifier decisions after stripping all non-gloss fields) and is not run
